_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of processes for collecting, packaging, transporting, and storing electronic evidence to avoid alteration, loss, physical damage, or destruction of data.
reference_document_element_description: Maintain Records of Processing Activities, including processing purposes, data categories, recipient categories, transfer records, retention periods, and technical and organizational security measures descriptions.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI RC domain. RC-T-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-K-020 (AI, cosine: 0.541), DQ-K-010 (DQ, cosine: 0.534).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.3/10 (raw 0.432). Shared vocabulary: [data]. DCWF-only terms [alteration, avoid, collecting, damage, destruction, electronic] vs WIDAI-only terms [activities, categories, descriptions, maintain, measures, organizational] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.867 (P=0.872, R=0.862). Balanced P/R — the 21-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.5%). "Knowledge of processes for collecting, packaging, transporting, and storing elec" and "Maintain Records of Processing Activities, including processing purposes, data c" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.586 > STS 0.432 (gap +0.153). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.3%. Shared tokens: [data]. DCWF-only: [alteration, avoid, collecting, damage, destruction, electronic]. WIDAI-only: [activities, categories, descriptions, maintain, measures, organizational].
